title.description: App name shown in the header. A recipe discovery app for world cuisines.

subtitle.text: Dëcouvi les recètes di tot l'monde
subtitle.description: Tagline shown below the app name in the header.

heroTitle.description: Main heading on the home page hero section.

heroSubtitle.text: Tchûz des recètes autenticådes des cwîcines do monde entou l'monde
heroSubtitle.description: Subtitle text displayed under the hero heading on the home page.

featuredTitle.description: Section heading displayed above the recipe card grid.

cookingTime.description: Cooking time label on a recipe card. {minutes} is replaced with the number of minutes.

difficulty.description: Label displayed before the difficulty level on a recipe card.

easy.description: Difficulty level label indicating an easy recipe.

medium.description: Difficulty level label indicating a moderately difficult recipe.

hard.description: Difficulty level label indicating a difficult recipe.

ramenName.description: Nom del ricete do Tonkotsu Ramen.

ramenDescription.text: Bouyon d osse di porc ric avou d tchashu tendre, ouf molèt, eyet nouilles freûdes.

margheritaName.description: Nom del ricete do Pizza Margherita.

margheritaDescription.text: Pizza napolitaine classike avou des tomates San Marzano, mozzarella freûde eyet basilic.

tacosName.description: Nom del ricete do Tacos al Pastor.

tacosDescription.text: Tacos di porc mariné avou d pineûpe, coriandre eyet ognon so des tortillas di blé.
tacosDescription.description: Descrîption del ricete Tacos al Pastor.

butterChickenName.description: Nom del ricete do Pôlet a l'Beurre.

butterChickenDescription.text: Pôlet tendre dins ene sauce crémêye di tomate eyet beurre avou des épices aromatiquès.
butterChickenDescription.description: Descrîption del ricete Pôlet a l'Beurre.

padThaiName.description: Nom del ricete do Pad Thai.

padThaiDescription.text: Nouilles di riz sautêyes avou des crevettes, tofu, cacahouètes eyet sauce tamarin.

crepesName.description: Nom del ricete do Crêpes francesès.

crepesDescription.text: Crêpes finesses eyet delicates plenes avou du Nutella, des fraises freûdes eyet de la crème fouettée.

label.description: Accessible label for the language switcher dropdown in the header.

en.description: English language option in the locale switcher.

ja.description: Japanese language option in the locale switcher.

es.description: Spanish language option in the locale switcher.
